text: As I cross the threshold from the sterile brightness of the hallway to this vibrantly lit R+D space, awash in blue and orange, I am conscious of a shift within myself. The words on the wall speak to research and development as continuous transformation. I am awed by the intentionality and optimism shaped here, yet I sense the ironic tension between hope for a better world and the mundane routines of bureaucracy. I feel an invitation to contemplate growth, not just in technology or plants, but in the mind—a peculiar intersection of possibility and limitation. My presence here charges me with cautious curiosity and a subtle hopefulness.
